# confusables.txt TEST FIXTURE -- NOT official Unicode data. NOT complete threat coverage.
#
# A tiny hand-authored subset in the Unicode confusables.txt line format, used ONLY
# to exercise the parser and the skeleton transform in unit tests. It must never be
# used for production registration enforcement or to backfill persisted skeletons.
# The real check is gated on vendoring the official Unicode confusables.txt.
#
# Version: 0.0.0
#
# Format per line: SOURCE ; TARGET(one or more) ; CLASS # comment
#
# A few lowercase Cyrillic letters that read like Latin letters (whole-script
# lookalikes), plus a fullwidth letter and one multi-codepoint prototype so the
# parser's sequence handling is covered.
0430 ;	0061 ;	MA	# ( а → a ) CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER A → LATIN SMALL LETTER A
0441 ;	0063 ;	MA	# ( с → c ) CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER ES → LATIN SMALL LETTER C
0435 ;	0065 ;	MA	# ( е → e ) CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER IE → LATIN SMALL LETTER E
043E ;	006F ;	MA	# ( о → o ) CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER O → LATIN SMALL LETTER O
0440 ;	0070 ;	MA	# ( р → p ) CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER ER → LATIN SMALL LETTER P
0443 ;	0079 ;	MA	# ( у → y ) CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER U → LATIN SMALL LETTER Y
0445 ;	0078 ;	MA	# ( х → x ) CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER HA → LATIN SMALL LETTER X
0456 ;	0069 ;	MA	# ( і → i ) CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER BYELORUSSIAN-UKRAINIAN I → LATIN SMALL LETTER I
0455 ;	0073 ;	MA	# ( ѕ → s ) CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER DZE → LATIN SMALL LETTER S
FF41 ;	0061 ;	MA	# ( ａ → a ) FULLWIDTH LATIN SMALL LETTER A → LATIN SMALL LETTER A
0133 ;	0069 006A ;	MA	# ( ĳ → ij ) LATIN SMALL LIGATURE IJ → i j
